The course is taken out of your gpa calculation for current term and cumulative. Term Totals (Undergraduate) as listed on your transcript exclude any course work for which an "NC" grade was

applied to a General Education (Gen Ed) course. The original grade received for the course is counted in your gpa calculation for current term and cumulative.
